title: Fix constraint_mode()/rand_mode() in constructor not disabling constraints (#7050)

features.name: constraint_mode() passed as function argument
features.description: Code should include passing constraint_mode() method call return value as a function argument
features.snippet:
class C; constraint c { value > 0; }; function int foo(int x); return x; endfunction
function new(); foo(constraint_mode(1)); endfunction
endclass

features.name: rand_mode() passed as function argument
features.description: Code should include passing rand_mode() method call return value as a function argument
features.snippet:
class C; rand int value; function int foo(int x); return x; endfunction
function new(); foo(rand_mode(1)); endfunction
endclass

features.name: nested randomization method calls in function arguments
features.description: Code should include nested calls to randomization methods (constraint_mode, rand_mode, randomize) passed as function arguments within a class
features.snippet:
class C; rand int x; constraint c { x < 10; };
function int bar(int v); return v; endfunction
function int foo(int v); return bar(v); endfunction
function new(); void'(foo(constraint_mode(1))); endfunction
endclass

features.name: constraint_mode query in expression context
features.description: Code should include constraint_mode() used in a query expression context, checking its return value
features.snippet:
class C; constraint c { value > 0; };
function int query(); return constraint_mode(1); endfunction
function new(); if (query() == 0) $display("disabled"); endfunction
endclass
